name: pi-smart-ralph
description: Pi-native Smart Ralph package for spec-driven development workflows.

scripts.prepack: node scripts/verify-start-flow-parity.mjs && node scripts/verify-implementation-loop-parity.mjs && npm run verify:index && npm run verify:pack && node scripts/verify-publish-bundle.mjs
scripts.verify:index: node scripts/verify-index-parity.mjs && node scripts/verify-task-blockers-parity.mjs --case acceptance-checklist && node scripts/verify-refactor-parity.mjs --case acceptance-checklist && node scripts/verify-feedback-parity.mjs --case acceptance-checklist && node scripts/verify-triage-github-sync-parity.mjs --case acceptance-checklist && node scripts/verify-implementation-loop-parity.mjs --case acceptance-checklist
scripts.verify:pack: node scripts/verify-task-blockers-parity.mjs --case cleanup && node scripts/verify-refactor-parity.mjs --case cleanup && node scripts/verify-feedback-parity.mjs --case cleanup && node scripts/verify-triage-github-sync-parity.mjs --case cleanup && node scripts/verify-implementation-loop-parity.mjs --case cleanup && node scripts/verify-pack-dry-run.mjs
